nasb.text: Harness the horses, And mount the steeds, And take your stand with helmets on! Polish the spears, Put on the scale-armor!

esv.text: Harness the horses; mount, O horsemen! Take your stations with your helmets, polish your spears, put on your armor!

cnv.text: 要裝備馬匹，騎上戰馬； 站好崗位，戴上頭盔； 磨快槍矛，穿上鐵甲。

ccb.text: 要套好战车， 骑上战马， 擦亮矛枪， 顶盔贯甲。
